note: Part 1 (P1 boxes): match three printed if-then rules to paths A/B/C on the fixed enerji–protein sample tree. Single correct letter per box (B, A, C). Operators on the printed tree use complementary pairs: enerji <180 vs ≥180; protein <7,7 vs ≥7,7. Part 2 (B1–B3): one if-then rule per leaf path of the student's WS6 tree — exact features, threshold values, operators (< > ≤ ≥), and leaf label. Partial 0.5 only when feature(s) and label are correct but an operator direction is wrong. B4–B7 not scored when the tree has three paths.

operator_rules.required: Complementary pairs on each DT split: ≤↔>, <↔≥, ≥↔<, >↔≤. Part 1 sample tree: enerji <180 | ≥180; protein <7,7 | ≥7,7.
operator_rules.part2: Operators in B1–B3 must match the student's WS6 branch notation exactly (not paraphrased to a different inequality).
invalid_examples: Rule uses ≥ when WS6 evet branch uses ≤

WS7_P1_box1.note: Printed rule row 5 (enerji ≥180 ve protein <7,7 → tavsiye edilemez) matches path B.

WS7_P1_box2.note: Printed rule row 6 (enerji <180 → tavsiye edilebilir) matches path A.

WS7_P1_box3.note: Printed rule row 7 (enerji ≥180 ve protein ≥7,7 → tavsiye edilebilir) matches path C.

components.idea: feature(s) along WS6 path 1 (root evet + inner evet when two-level)
exact operator per split (< > ≤ ≥) matching WS6 evet/hayır branches
conclusion matches WS6 leaf on path 1

WS7_B1.example_answer: Eğer şeker ≤ 10 ve yağ ≤ 5 ise → Tavsiye edilir.

components.idea: exact operators including complementary hayır branch (e.g. yağ > 5 when evet uses ≤ 5)
conclusion matches WS6 leaf on path 2

WS7_B2.example_answer: Eğer şeker ≤ 10 ve yağ > 5 ise → Tavsiye edilmez.

components.idea: feature(s) along WS6 root hayır path
complementary operator on root hayır branch (e.g. şeker > 10 when evet uses ≤ 10)
conclusion matches WS6 leaf on path 3 (typically B13)
